title: Item
description: One inventory line — a mundane or magic item the character holds, plus how many and its details. Referenced by the character sheet's `inventory`. Content-neutral: item/category/rarity/property names are catalog-driven, never enumerated here.

equipped.description: Whether the item is currently worn/wielded — the source for AC and attack derivation.

category.description: Item category identifier (catalog), e.g. armour / weapon / gear.

rarity.description: Rarity identifier (catalog); null for mundane items.

attunement.description: Attunement state for a magic item. Absent for items that don't use attunement.
